introSection: Grand Prix Racers is a steel family rollercoaster located at Gulliver's Land in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, UK. It is manufactured by SBF Visa Group and is located in the Adventure Land Themed Area.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Blue track and unpainted supports.

Riders are arranged in a train made up of 5 cars, seating 4 people in 2 rows of 2, making for a total of 20 riders per train.

fullText:
Grand Prix Racers is a steel family rollercoaster located at Gulliver's Land in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, UK. It is manufactured by SBF Visa Group and is located in the Adventure Land Themed Area.

Blue track and unpainted supports.

Riders are arranged in a train made up of 5 cars, seating 4 people in 2 rows of 2, making for a total of 20 riders per train.
